Defendant Tesla Inc.S Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration With Aaa And Stay Proceedings Pending Outcome Of Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Raymond Kim And Bradley M. Tanner
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Sharona Silver, Esq. (619.374.4100; SharonaSilver@bickelsannipoli.com) of Bickel Sannipoli APC for Plaintiff.
Bradley Tanner, Esq. (415.340.0375; brtanner@tesla.com) of Tesla, Inc. for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TESLA, INC.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration With AAA And Stay Proceedings Pending Outcome Of Arbitration is granted.

see word minutes for details.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling via email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
